results.title: Stock Market Today, April 30: Caterpillar's Jump After Earnings Helped Fuel Surge in Dow | The Motley Fool
Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P Live Updates for April 30 - Bloomberg
Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P Live Updates for April 29 - Bloomberg
Mag 7 Momentum: Stocks Up on Earnings, Data, Oil

summary: S&P 500 hit a fresh all-time high on April 30 at 7,209.01 (+1.02%). Nasdaq +0.89% to 24,892.31. Dow +1.62% to 49,652.14. Caterpillar +10% on earnings beat. Eli Lilly +7% on strong Q1 results and raised guidance. Meta -9% on heavy AI capex. Asia-Pacific markets fell. Fed held rates steady.
